Workflow.Name: restaurant_daily_pipeline_workflow
Workflow.Description: Orchestrates the daily restaurant analytics pipeline, starting with SQL Server to S3 raw ingestion jobs and later expanding to silver, gold, and mart transformations.

Trigger.Name: restaurant_daily_pipeline_start_trigger
Trigger.Description: Starts the restaurant daily pipeline workflow manually for testing and validation.

Trigger.Name: restaurant_after_all_marts_crawler_trigger
Trigger.Description: Trigger to run the glue crawler after all jobs complete.

Trigger.Name: restaurant_after_all_marts_crawler_trigger
Trigger.Description: Trigger to run the glue crawler after all jobs complete.

Trigger.Name: restaurant_daily_pipeline_schedule_trigger
Trigger.Description: Starting trigger for Global Business Partners restaurant data pipeline workflow.
